rulesStrings.li: image->[ADOPTER_nameFull] offering home and a family to [ADOPTEE_nameFull] [circumstance_group]
image->[ADOPTER_nameFull] leading [ADOPTEE_nameFull] by the hand to their new home [circumstance_group]
image->[ADOPTER_nameFull] promising to love and care for [ADOPTEE_nameFull] as a parent does for their child [circumstance_group]
circumstance_phrase->while others look on with warmth
desc_sentence->[ADOPTER_nameDef] is offering a hand to [ADOPTEE_nameDef].
desc_sentence->[ADOPTER_nameDef] is holding the hand of [ADOPTEE_nameDef].
